response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth and versatile experience across multiple languages and systems, including experimentation-relevant domains like telemetry and distributed systems. His roles show leadership in building scalable platforms and mentoring teams. However, his resume lacks explicit focus on growth/experimentation systems, statistical rigor, or AI-driven tooling, which are critical for this role. His experimentation experience is not clearly highlighted.
strengths: Strong background in building scalable, distributed systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentorship (e.g., organizing refactoring dojos, creating training courses)
Versatile polyglot with deep expertise in low-latency systems (Dlang, C/C++) and modern web stacks (TypeScript, React)
concerns: No clear evidence of direct experience with experimentation/feature-flagging systems or A/B testing frameworks
Limited mention of statistical methods, metrics infrastructure, or experimental analysis (key requirements for growth systems)
Current roles focus more on general software development and AI-agent infrastructure, not growth experimentation platforms
